ratings.label: adverse
ratings.evidence: SPY-baseline FAIL (Calmar 0.34 vs SPY 0.56), OOS CAGR 12.9%, 44% unrecovered DD, 9/22 neg windows

why: Park the all-weather config: Broad adverse (SPY-FAIL, sub-floor). THRUST is only neutral/borderline (t≈1.96), not favourable — the THRUST-specialist remains a FUTURE redesign (fresh regime-conditional candidate + within-THRUST null), preserved in the ratings, not a gate on this config.

ratings.label: neutral
ratings.evidence: Live read under #167 (udgaard 1.0.94, sectorStats now emits edgeStandardError/trimmedEdge/maxSingleTradeProfitShare; continuous run 239232fb, 1043 trades, endDate 2025-12-31). Replaces the prior unrateable-pending-instrumentation entry. 5/11 cells rateable + uniformly flat (XLF,XLV,XLB,XLRE,XLU — all |trimmedEdge| ≤ 2.5·SE); 6/11 unrateable (XLK,XLI,XLY,XLC,XLE raw-vs-trimmed sign-flip; XLP concentration). 0 favourable, 0 adverse. Two highest RAW edges (XLU 8.51, XLP 7.94) are the thin tail-carried cells the trim/concentration guards now neutralize — neither carries a label.
ratings.caveat: Hypothesis-thin: dimension is neutral only where rateable; tail-dependence is the headline finding (5 sign-flips + XLP concentration trip). k=2.5 sector family; ~11-cell multiplicity flagged, not corrected. regime×sector cross is unrateable by construction. Descriptive-only.
ratings.confirm_path: n/a — no favourable cell. A favourable sector WOULD point to a fresh, distinct, sector-scoped candidate + within-sector conditional null through the firewall, NEVER a prune of this config (rescue-forbidden, ADR 0023).
